ocr.text: In Q1 2024, Boeing's Supply Chain Metrics indicate an Average Lead Time of 45 Days, On-Time Delivery at 92%, Inventory
Turnover of 8.5 Times, Supplier Reliability at 98%, a Cost Index of 1.2, Production Efficiency at 87%, a Quality Index of 1.5,
and Customer Satisfaction of 92%. In comparison, Q4 2023 showed an Average Lead Time of 50 Days, On-Time Delivery at
88%, Inventory Turnover of 8.2 Times, Supplier Reliability at 96%, a Cost Index of 1.3, Production Efficiency at 85%, a
Quality Index of 1.6, and Customer Satisfaction of 88%.
SupplyChainMetrics  LeadTimeAnalysis  TotalOrders
AverageLeadTime  On-TimeDelivery  InventoryTurnover  SupplierReliability  CostIndex  ProductionEfficiency  QualityIndex  CustomerSatisfaction
Q3 2023 recorded an Average Lead Time of 48 Days, On-Time Delivery of 90%, Inventory Turnover at 8.0 Times, Supplier
Reliability at 95%, a Cost Index of 1.4, Production Efficiency of 83%, a Quality Index of 1.7, and Customer Satisfaction at
90%. In Q2 2023, the metrics were an Average Lead Time of 52 Days, On-Time Delivery at 85%, Inventory Turnover of 7.8
Times, Supplier Reliability at 94%, a Cost Index of 1.5, Production Efficiency of 80%, a Quality Index of 1.8, and Customer
Satisfaction at 85%. For Q1 2023, the data reflects an Average Lead Time of 53 Days, On-Time Delivery of 84%, Inventory
Turnover at 7.5 Times, Supplier Reliability at 92%, a Cost Index of 1.6, Production Efficiency at 78%, a Quality Index of 1.9,
and Customer Satisfaction at 84%. In the Aftermarket Service, Commercial Services generated Amount (CHF) 45.2M with a
YoY Change of 5.3%, a Market Share of 22.4%, and a Gross Margin of 18.2%. Defense Services contributed Amount (CHF)
30.8M with a YoY Change of 4.9%, a Market Share of 15.0%, and a Gross Margin of 20.0%. The Total Services amounted to
76.0M, showing a YoY Change of 5.1%, a Market Share of 37.4%, and a Gross Margin of 19.5%. In the Service Region,
Europe accounted for Amount (CHF) 55.0M with a YoY Change of 6.0%, a Market Share of 35.0%, and a Gross Margin of
20.0%. Asia generated Amount (CHF) 21.0M with a YoY Change of 2.0%, a Market Share of 15.0%, and a Gross Margin of
18.0%. North America reported Amount (CHF) 20.0M with a YoY Change of 8.0%, a Market Share of 25.0%, and a Gross
Margin of 22.0%.
